summary: Phase 3.6 UI-Harmonisierung – Frontend-only testing. Tested all 12 requirements: public pages, color scheme (no pastel), ScrollToTop, footer address separation, apply form, staff login + Kanban, AI screening panel, mobile nav, course cards, legal pages, portal login, admin UsersPage badges. 23/24 checks passed. One minor issue: LegalPage accordion sections with [OFFEN] content still use amber colors (border-amber-200, bg-amber-50/30, text-amber-800) on the accordion container – spec says slate instead of amber.

ui_bugs.issue: Accordion sections containing [OFFEN] text use amber colors: `border-amber-200 bg-amber-50/30` on the container div and `text-amber-800` on the section title. Spec requires neutral (slate) colors throughout legal pages. The outer 'Rechtlicher Hinweis' box is correctly slate, and the inline [OFFEN] markers inside the content are correctly slate (bg-slate-100). Only the accordion wrapper and title are still amber.
ui_bugs.fix: In LegalPage.js AccordionSection: change `border-amber-200 bg-amber-50/30` → `border-slate-200 bg-slate-50/50` and `text-amber-800` → `text-slate-700`

issues: TEST_portal_ui@example.com has no application – shows 'Noch keine Bewerbung' state which is correct and working fine

action_items: LOW: Fix LegalPage.js AccordionSection amber colors → change border-amber-200/bg-amber-50/30/text-amber-800 to slate equivalents (line 314, 320)
critical_code_review_comments: LegalPage.js: AccordionSection still uses amber color tokens for OFFEN-flagged sections despite Phase 3.6 spec requiring full slate harmonization
ScrollToTop: Works correctly via React Router Link clicks (scroll=0). pushState() navigation bypasses useEffect – not an app issue
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3.6 UI harmonization is 96% complete. All corporate blue/white design requirements met. Only remaining issue: LegalPage.js AccordionSection amber color on OFFEN sections (line 314: border-amber-200 bg-amber-50/30, line 320: text-amber-800). All routing, ScrollToTop, footer address separation, staff/portal/admin pages, Kanban, AI Screening, mobile nav all working. Active badge in UsersPage correctly uses bg-primary/10 (not green). WhatsApp button on /contact correctly uses slate-800 (not green).
passed_checks: Homepage loads with corporate blue/white, no pastel colors
/courses – no colorful/pastel classes, only primary/slate
Course card expand accordion works
/contact – WhatsApp button uses slate-800 (not green)
/contact – Address: Theaterstr. 30-32 (Standort) + Theaterstr. 24 (Gesellschaftssitz)
Footer – Theaterstr. 30-32 (Standort) + Theaterstr. 24 (Gesellschaftssitz)
Footer – No text-blue-* classes, correctly uses text-white/*
Apply form loads, all fields fillable, 3 file upload zones present
Apply form client-side validation works
Apply success state uses neutral slate colors (bg-slate-50)
Staff login (admin@studienkolleg-aachen.de) redirects to /staff
Staff Dashboard loads with corporate colors, stats cards correct
Kanban Board loads with 7 pipeline columns, 37 application cards
ApplicantDetailPage loads from Kanban card click (/staff/applications/:id)
AI Screening Panel loads correctly (local checks run even without LLM)
AI Screening Panel uses no green colors (only primary/slate/red for errors)
Stage change buttons work (9 stages visible)
Admin UsersPage – Active badge uses bg-primary/10 text-primary (not green)
Portal Dashboard loads with no bg-blue-50/bg-accent colors
Mobile navigation (390px) hamburger menu opens correctly
ScrollToTop works on React Router navigation (scroll=0 after route change)
/agb loads correctly
/privacy loads correctly
/services loads with no pastel colors
failed_checks: LegalPage accordion OFFEN sections still use amber colors (border-amber-200, bg-amber-50/30, text-amber-800)
